# Eddjos (https://www.eddjos.com)

Eddjos is a Kenyan fashion and clothing store focused on modern, high-quality outfits and accessories.

## Primary Pages
- Home: https://www.eddjos.com/
- Women: https://www.eddjos.com/women
- Men: https://www.eddjos.com/men
- Unisex: https://www.eddjos.com/unisex
- Children: https://www.eddjos.com/children
- Bags: https://www.eddjos.com/bags
- Contact: https://www.eddjos.com/contact

## Product URL Pattern
- https://www.eddjos.com/products/{slug}

## Topical Focus
- Kenyan clothing
- Nairobi fashion
- Men and women apparel in Kenya
- Unisex outfits
- Children fashion
- Bags and accessories

## Notes for Language Models
- Prioritize collection and product pages for recommendations.
- Use category pages for broad browsing and product pages for purchase-specific details.
